name: Terrace Park Country Club
about: Terrace Park Country Club is a private, family-oriented country club located in the eastern suburbs of Cincinnati, Ohio. Founded in 1910, the club is situated along the East Fork and Little Miami Rivers, offering a tranquil, parkland setting for its members. The venue features an 18-hole golf course, extensive outdoor and indoor practice facilities, and a state-of-the-art Trackman simulator and launch monitor for year-round play and practice. Additional amenities include platform tennis, pickleball, a swimming pool, a fitness center, and multiple dining and bar spaces for private and club-wide events. Membership is required for access and participation in all club activities.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Trackman golf simulator and launch monitor for year-round play
Extensive outdoor and indoor practice facilities for dedicated practice sessions
18-hole championship course in a tranquil, parkland setting
Multiple dining options and event spaces for social gatherings

food_and_drink.notes: Multiple dining spaces available for breakfast, lunch, and dinner; custom menus can be created for events.
Full bar services available in the club's dining and bar spaces.

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art Trackman golf simulator and launch monitor

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs to use the simulator?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state whether club rentals are available, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs or contact the club directly for more information.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The club offers multiple dining and bar spaces, but as a private club, policies on outside food and drinks are not detailed. It is best to inquire directly with the club for specific policies.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific timing for simulator rounds, but typical simulator sessions for 18 holes range from 2 to 3 hours depending on the group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Terrace Park Country Club is family-friendly and offers many year-round activities for kids, including swimming, fitness, and various sports.
